  • Method Details

    • nbRounds

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams nbRounds(int nbRounds)
      Parameters:
      nbRounds - Maximum number of rounds to play [ 3 .. 100 ]

    • name

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams name(String name)
      Parameters:
      name - The tournament name. Leave empty to get a random Grandmaster name.

    • rated

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams rated(boolean rated)

    • startsAt

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams startsAt(long startsAt)
      Timestamp in milliseconds to start the tournament at a given date and time. By default, it starts 10 minutes after creation.

    • startsAt

      default TournamentsAuth.SwissParams startsAt(ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime)
      Parameters:
      zonedDateTime - Timestamp to start the tournament at a given date and time.

    • roundInterval

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams roundInterval(int roundInterval)
      How long to wait between each round, in seconds. Leave empty for "auto". [ 0 .. 86400 ] Set to 99999999 to manually schedule each round from the tournament UI.

    • variant

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams variant(Enums.VariantName variant)

    • description

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams description(String description)

    • entryCode

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams entryCode(String entryCode)
      Make the tournament restricted with a entry code.
      Parameters:
      entryCode -

    • chatFor

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams chatFor(Enums.ChatFor chatFor)
      Who can read and write in the chat. Default only team members.

    • addForbiddenPairing

      default TournamentsAuth.SwissParams addForbiddenPairing(String player1, String player2)
      Usernames of two players that must not play together.

    • addForbiddenPairing

      default TournamentsAuth.SwissParams addForbiddenPairing(TournamentsAuth.SwissParams.ForbiddenPairing forbiddenPairing)
      Usernames of two players that must not play together.

    • addForbiddenPairings

      TournamentsAuth.SwissParams addForbiddenPairings(Collection<TournamentsAuth.SwissParams.ForbiddenPairing> forbiddenPairings)
      Set of usernames of players that must not play together.

    • chatFor

      default TournamentsAuth.SwissParams chatFor(Function<Enums.ChatFor.Provider,Enums.ChatFor> chatFor)

    • variant

      default TournamentsAuth.SwissParams variant(Function<Enums.VariantName.Provider,Enums.VariantName> variant)
